description.p: Trelby is simple, fast and elegantly laid out to make screenwriting simple. It is infinitely configurable.

ul.li: Screenplay editor: Enforces correct script format and pagination, auto-completion, and spell checking.
Multiple views: Multiple views, including draft view, WYSIWYG mode, and fullscreen to suit your writing style.
Name database: Character name database containing over 200,000 names from various countries.
Compare scripts: Compare scripts, so you know what changed between versions.
